result.stdout:
Description:
  copilot_here - GitHub Copilot CLI in a secure Docker container

Usage:
  copilot_here [<copilot-args>...] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <copilot-args>  Additional arguments passed to GitHub Copilot CLI

Options:
  --tool <tool>                                    Override CLI tool (github-copilot, echo, etc.)
  --image <image>                                  [-i] Use a custom Docker image (e.g., my-image:tag, registry.io/org/image:v1)
  --dotnet                                         [-d] Use .NET image variant (all versions)
  --dotnet8                                        [-d8] Use .NET 8 image variant
  --dotnet9                                        [-d9] Use .NET 9 image variant
  --dotnet10                                       [-d10] Use .NET 10 image variant
  --playwright                                     [-pw] Use Playwright image variant
  --dotnet-playwright                              [-dp] Use .NET + Playwright image variant
  --rust                                           [-rs] Use Rust image variant
  --dotnet-rust                                    [-dr] Use .NET + Rust image variant
  --golang                                         [-go] Use Golang image variant
  --java                                           [-j] Use Java image variant (JDK 21 + Maven + Gradle)
  --mount <mount>                                  Mount directory (read-only). Format: path or host:container
  --mount-rw <mount-rw>                            Mount directory (read-write). Format: path or host:container
  --no-cleanup                                     Skip cleanup of unused Docker images
  --no-pull, --skip-pull                           Skip pulling the latest image
  --help2                                          Show GitHub Copilot CLI native help
  --update                                         [-u] Update binary and scripts (handled by shell wrapper)
  --install-shells                                 Install shell integrations (bash/zsh/fish + PowerShell/cmd)
  --yolo                                           Enable YOLO mode (allow all tools, paths, and URLs)
  -p, --prompt <prompt>                            [Copilot] Execute a prompt directly
  --model <model>                                  [Copilot] Set AI model (claude-sonnet-4.5, gpt-5, etc.)
  --continue                                       [Copilot] Resume most recent session
  --resume <resume>                                [Copilot] Resume from a previous session [sessionId]
  -s, --silent                                     [Copilot] Output only agent response, useful for scripting with -p
  --agent <agent>                                  [Copilot] Specify a custom agent to use (only in prompt mode)
  --no-color                                       [Copilot] Disable all color output
  --allow-tool <allow-tool>                        [Copilot] Allow specific tools (can be used multiple times)
  --deny-tool <deny-tool>                          [Copilot] Deny specific tools (can be used multiple times)
  --stream <stream>                                [Copilot] Enable or disable streaming (on|off)
  --log-level <log-level>                          [Copilot] Set log level (none|error|warning|info|debug|all)
  --screen-reader                                  [Copilot] Enable screen reader optimizations
  --no-custom-instructions                         [Copilot] Disable loading custom instructions from AGENTS.md
  --additional-mcp-config <additional-mcp-config>  [Copilot] Additional MCP servers config (JSON string or @filepath)
  -?, -h, --help                                   Show help and usage information
  --version                                        Show version information

Commands:
  --list-mounts                   Show all configured mounts
  --save-mount <path>             Save mount to local config (.copilot_here/mounts.conf)
  --save-mount-global <path>      Save mount to global config (~/.config/copilot_here/mounts.conf)
  --remove-mount <path>           Remove mount from configs
  --list-images                   List all available Docker images
  --show-image                    Show current default image configuration
  --set-image <tag>               Set default image in local config
  --set-image-global <tag>        Set default image in global config
  --clear-image                   Clear default image from local config
  --clear-image-global            Clear default image from global config
  --list-models                   List available AI models
  --show-model                    Show current default model configuration
  --set-model <model>             Set default model in local config
  --set-model-global <model>      Set default model in global config
  --clear-model                   Clear local model configuration
  --clear-model-global            Clear global model configuration
  --list-tools                    List all available CLI tools
  --show-tool                     Show the currently active CLI tool
  --set-tool <name>               Set the active CLI tool (global)
  --set-tool-local <name>         Set the active CLI tool (local project)
  --enable-airlock                Enable Airlock with local rules (.copilot_here/network.json)
  --enable-global-airlock         Enable Airlock with global rules (~/.config/copilot_here/network.json)
  --disable-airlock               Disable Airlock for local config
  --disable-global-airlock        Disable Airlock for global config
  --show-airlock-rules            Show current Airlock proxy rules
  --edit-airlock-rules            Edit local Airlock rules in $EDITOR
  --edit-global-airlock-rules     Edit global Airlock rules in $EDITOR
  --show-runtime                  Show current container runtime configuration
  --list-runtimes                 List all available container runtimes
  --set-runtime <runtime>         Set container runtime in local config
  --set-runtime-global <runtime>  Set container runtime in global config
